rows.label: qev051002_MSG0001
rows.name: Ee-eek?! You are...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh, thank goodness... You don't
appear to be that crazy Larsian...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0003
rows.name:
Do you need something from me? If it's a request
from a reasonable-looking person like you, I'd
be happy to listen as much as you need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051002_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask what in the world that
crazy Larsian did to her.

rows.label: qev051002_JNK0020
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev051002_SEL0021
rows.name:
Reveal that De Zing is
the one who sent you.

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0004
rows.name:
You're worried about me? You
really are a kind person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0005
rows.name:
Lately, I've been stalked
by that Larsian...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0006
rows.name:
Whether I'm at work or at home, he follows me
everywhere, trying to force me to reveal my
Niilop-style hypersteel refining method...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0007
rows.name:
Even when I tell him I can't teach him, he
just keeps closing in, screaming incomprehensible
nonsense about "Dreams!" and "Kongōfue!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0008
rows.name:
...What?! You're telling me
that man asked you to come here
and demand my steel data?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0009
rows.name:
So that Larsian finally
resorted to hiring someone...
What a terrifying stalker...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0010
rows.name:
...However, unlike that man,
you seem to possess common
sense and sound judgment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm tired of living my life
constantly running away from
him anyway... I understand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you bring me the Verde self-destruct device
I need for my upcoming research, I'll teach you
the Niilop-style hypersteel refining method.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0013
rows.name:
Yes... If I do that, I'll finally
be free from that Larsian...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'm giving up a refining method I've spent
years researching... So please, at least
get me the Verde self-destruct device.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0015
rows.name:
And... please free me
from that Larsian...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0016
rows.name: E-Eek...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Oh, it was just you... I'm
sorry, that man has given me
some serious trauma...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0018
rows.name:
Last time, he came charging at me swinging
around a bladed weapon called a "katana"... I
seriously thought I was going to be murdered...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_JNK0030
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev051002_SEL0031
rows.name: Comfort the traumatized Niilop.

rows.label: qev051002_JNK0040
rows.name: Defend

rows.label: qev051002_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that De Zing likely just
wanted to show her his katana.

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0019
rows.name:
*Sniff*... I'm so glad to have
someone like you who understands...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0020
rows.name:
Um... so, were you able to find
the Verde self-destruct device?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0021
rows.name:
You really are a broad-minded
person... Why is someone like
you helping that man...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Well, it doesn't matter.
So, were you able to find the
Verde self-destruct device?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0023
rows.name:
I've received it. Now then...
I'll teach you the Niilop-style
hypersteel refining method.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0024
rows.name:
Simply combine Dark Cinnabar and
Zagyrin Rock exactly as detailed in
this data, and it will be complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0025
rows.name:
This is brand-new technology, unknown
even among the Ma-non, so I would
appreciate it if you kept it to yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0026
rows.name:
*Sigh*... By the way, what exactly is
this "katana" that man is trying to make?
Is it really such a powerful weapon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051002_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell her it is a terrifying weapon that
cuts through anything and never breaks.

rows.label: qev051002_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051002_SEL0061
rows.name:
Tell her it is an antiquated
weapon with no practical use.

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0027
rows.name:
Is it really that incredible...? As an
engineer, I must admit I'm a bit curious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'd love to test my armor against
this "katana" someday... Just to
see which one comes out on top.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0029
rows.name:
Hmmm... To boast such strength using
toy-like weapons... The Larsians
certainly are a fascinating people...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0030
rows.name:
No... regardless, I still
have no desire to ever get
involved with that man again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please tell him to completely
forget I even exist...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0032
rows.name:
My peaceful life has finally returned...
I truly am grateful to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051002_MSG0033
rows.name:
I can finally focus on my research
again. Someday, I'll invent an even
more incredible hypersteel![ST:wait ]
